task_completion.description: Load the IsPETase structure (PDB: 6EQE) into the molecular viewer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL interface is open with a protein structure loaded. '6EQE' should be visible in the object menu/panel on the right side of the screen.

task_completion.description: Display the backbone as a cartoon and the specific residues (Ser160, Asp206, His237, Trp185) as sticks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main protein structure is shown in a 'cartoon' representation (ribbons/helices), while a small cluster of four residues in the active site cleft is highlighted in a 'sticks' representation.

task_completion.description: Measure the distance between Ser160 (OG) and His237 (NE2).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A distance measurement (usually a dashed line) is visible between two of the stick residues (Ser160 and His237) in the viewer. A numerical label should be visible on the line showing a value between 2.2 and 4.2 (ideally around 2.94).

task_completion.description: Save the active site figure to ~/PyMOL_Data/images/petase_active_site.png.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A PyMOL command (e.g., 'png ~/PyMOL_Data/images/petase_active_site.png'), a save dialog box, or a file manager window confirming the image was saved to the exact specified path.

task_completion.description: Write the structural report to ~/PyMOL_Data/petase_report.txt with all required details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the contents of 'petase_report.txt'. The text must include the PDB ID (6EQE), the catalytic triad (Ser160, Asp206, His237), the wobbling residue (Trp185), and the measured distance in Angstroms.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used PyMOL to load the structure and perform the measurement.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the PyMOL GUI or PyMOL command-line interface being actively used to manipulate the 6EQE structure, rather than the agent just writing a Python script without visual confirmation.

integrity.description: Verify the distance reported in the text file matches the actual measurement taken in the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The distance value written in 'petase_report.txt' should exactly match the numerical value shown on the measurement line in the PyMOL viewer, proving the agent didn't hallucinate or copy the value from external knowledge.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually created the required files rather than just typing the content into the terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for commands like 'nano', 'vim', 'echo ... >', or a GUI text editor saving to '/home/ga/PyMOL_Data/petase_report.txt', and PyMOL commands/dialogs saving the .png file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct PDB ID is 6EQE. The catalytic triad consists of Ser160, Asp206, and His237, and the wobbling residue is Trp185. The true distance between Ser160 (OG) and His237 (NE2) is approximately 2.94 Angstroms. You should accept any measured distance between 2.2 and 4.2 Angstroms as correct. The figure must be saved to /home/ga/PyMOL_Data/images/petase_active_site.png and the report to /home/ga/PyMOL_Data/petase_report.txt.
